steps.title: Track the opposing view
steps.content: The underlined sentence reports The Times' view that everyone should be free to do and look as they like. The next sentence begins with "But," showing that Arnold contrasts culture with that view.

steps.title: Identify the sentence function
steps.content: A adds unfair criticism that the sentence does not assert. C says the sentence supports Arnold, but it sets up the view he rejects. D introduces change over time, which is absent. The sentence presents an opinion Arnold disagrees with. The answer is B.
